title: Auth Service Degraded — EU-West Region — Under Investigation
rca: Unknown. Auth service in EU-West region is experiencing elevated latency (4-6s vs <200ms baseline). Approximately 30% of auth requests affected. Root cause under investigation.
resolution_steps: 1. Ticket INC0043887 opened, Auth Platform Team assigned
2. SRE investigating Redis, database, and network layers
business_impact: Approximately 30% of EU-West region users experiencing session drops and authentication failures. 3 enterprise accounts impacted including Salesforce SSO disruption. US-region appears unaffected.

communication_log.note: Auth latency spike first reported by Security Engineering
Customer success reports 3 enterprise accounts affected
